profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Dewi Shri Farmindo Tbk. engages in the of broiler chicken farming and slaughtering business in Indonesia. The company operates through Commercial Broiler Chicken and Carcass segments. It offers a range of poultry products, such as thigh, breast, wing, leg, feet, skin, and heart and gizzard, as well as frozen and ready-to-cook chicken products. The company is also involved in raising, harvesting, processing, freezing, storage, and delivering of broilers; and livestock retail trade. PT Dewi Shri Farmindo Tbk. was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Cianjur, Indonesia.
